prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 editorial fashion poster titled SOFT STATIC, showing a dreamy moody bedroom photoshoot in two stacked horizontal portrait panels. The subject is a young woman with very long messy wavy black hair, pale skin, soft tired eyes, and delicate doll-like features, wearing a pale blush pink satin camisole with thin straps and a ribbon tie at the neck and a matching blush pink ruffled sleep mask pushed up on her forehead with faint cursive embroidery. Use a muted dusty pink, sepia, and warm brown color grade with soft film grain, slight blur, halation, low contrast, and a vintage magazine scan texture. The room should feel romantic and slightly chaotic: ornate carved vintage chair, lace fabric, pearl strands, rumpled bedding or tablecloth, dim boudoir decor, and warm round vanity bulbs glowing in the background. Count and compose exactly 2 stacked image panels: the top panel is a closer three-quarter portrait with the woman leaning her bare shoulder forward and looking down to the side, with glowing vanity bulbs behind her on the right and the large headline on the left; the bottom panel is a slightly wider seated portrait where she gazes toward the viewer, her hair spreading over her shoulders, with pearls and lace visible on the left and the ornate chair behind her. Add exactly 7 visible editorial text elements in small distressed typography: 1 large serif title on the left reading "SOFT STATIC"; 2 tiny lines below it reading "soft light /" and "restless heart / vintage dream"; 3 an upper-left micro caption in the top panel reading "SLEEPING IS EASY / THE SILENCE IS NOT." plus tiny barcode-like marks and "VOL. 09"; 4 a small right-side caption in the top panel reading "TASTE LIKE / MEMORIES."; 5 an upper-left micro caption in the bottom panel reading "BEAUTY IN THE NOISE. / TRUTH IN THE STATIC. / REMAIN" with tiny waveform marks; 6 a lower-left caption reading "SILENT / BUT / BURNING"; 7 a bottom-center and right editorial caption reading "STATIC SOUL / EDITORIAL SERIES / VOL." and "I WEAR / THE NIGHT / LIKE A / WHISPER." Use elegant tall condensed serif lettering for the title, tiny monospaced white text for captions, subtle red guide lines and scan artifacts, and no extra logos or watermarks. The mood should be Midnight Echo, sleepy, melancholic, intimate, pink-lit, restless Friday-night glamour.
